events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: Confined space work after hold point, earlier prerequisite step not shown, no signoff page attached. Reference OSHA 1910.146. Need determine decision likely fail because permit-required confined space entry requires written permit completed before entry; prerequisite step missing signoff means permit not properly authorized/reviewed? Need output. Need include observations: missing prerequisite signoff, permit documentation incomplete, sequence violation. Risk high/critical? OSHA confined space entry without permit critical. work_stage in-progress. percent_complete maybe 40. value irrelevant 0. component_conditions none. confidence 0.85. event_time 0 rate 0 sound_source "". order maybe? We can list step IDs from confined space process: hazard evaluation, permit issuance, atmospheric testing, ventilation, isolation, entry briefing, entry. But not requested? We can populate order with observed/missing sequence. workable empty. findings and actions. references: OSHA 1910.146(c)-(e). Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Need produce raw JSON no markdown. Ensure valid JSON.

    "No signed permit or attached signoff page documenting hazard evaluation, atmospheric testing, or authorization.",
    "Sequence violation: entry-related work is in progress before the required permit and pre-entry controls are verified."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop confined space entry work immediately.",
    "Locate or reproduce the missing prerequisite signoff/permit documentation.",
    "Verify hazard evaluation, atmospheric testing, isolation/ventilation, and rescue plans before authorizing re-start.",
    "Have a competent person reissue and sign the confined space entry permit prior to any re-entry."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.146 requires a written permit and completion of pre-entry measures before permit-required confined space entry. The absence of the prerequisite signoff while work is already in progress means the required sequence was violated and workers may be exposed to unverified atmospheric or physical hazards.",
